subject: Computer Networking
title: How Streaming Works
description: A short lesson to help you apply How Streaming Works.

hook.text: You press play. The video starts instantly — even though the full file is gigabytes. That's streaming.

buildup.text: Streaming sends data in small chunks. Your player buffers a few seconds ahead while you watch.

discovery.text: Adaptive bitrate adjusts quality in real time. Slow connection? You get 480p. Fast? You get 4K.

twist.text: Netflix alone accounts for about 15% of global internet traffic. Streaming dominates bandwidth worldwide.

climax.text: Without CDNs and smart buffering, streaming would stutter constantly. The tech behind 'just press play' is deep.

punchline.text: Streaming delivers just enough, just in time.

quiz.question: What does adaptive bitrate streaming do?
options: Adjusts video quality based on connection speed in real time
Compresses the video file permanently to save storage
Blocks ads from appearing during playback
